name: nightmare-library
description: A private digital library for EPUB and PDF books with obsidian-black theme

scripts.build: echo 'No build step required for vanilla frontend'
scripts.db:migrate:all: wrangler d1 execute nightmare-library-db --remote --file=./migrations/0001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute nightmare-library-db --remote --file=./migrations/0002_add_features.sql && wrangler d1 execute nightmare-library-db --remote --file=./migrations/0003_add_content_index.sql && wrangler d1 execute nightmare-library-db --remote --file=./migrations/0004_add_annotations.sql
